sections.paragraph:
to act fraudulently, Mal 1:14. (Syr. Ch. and Sam. id.)

Piel, id. followed by לְ of pers. Num 25:18.

Hithpael, id. followed by כְּ Psa 105:25 and even with an acc. (to treat or deal with some one fraudulently), Gen 37:18.

Derived nouns כִּילַי and כֵּלַי (for נְכִילַי, נכֵלַי), and-נֵכֶל m. pl. נְכָלִים, נִכְלי machination, wile, Num 25:18.
